note: BLOCK INTERVALS chart no longer fakes wide bars across missing blocks. When a getblock RPC fails during dashboard fetch, the dropped block left a gap that the chart treated as a single huge interval (e.g. 7383->7424 jump = 40 blocks merged into one bar of ~24,000s). The fix: (1) sort diffs descending by height before slicing so the chart always picks the highest 288 successfully-fetched blocks, (2) skip interval bars where data[i].h !== data[i-1].h+1, and (3) surface the gap count in the title (e.g. 'BLOCK INTERVALS (#7150 -> #7437, 288 blocks, 3 gaps skipped)'). Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) if cached.
